cycle_contract_ready · server_connector_next_mobile_mvp

Cycle State

server-connector-next-mobile-mvp
Public API
/api/v1 · frontend direct Node calls blocked
Browser boundary
raw OCR hidden · external writes approval-gated
Goals
fastapi_v1_connectorimplemented · Remote clients integrate through FastAPI /api/v1 instead of Node internals.
next_mobile_pwaimplemented_visual_verified · Mobile-first Next.js PWA shell uses only /api/v1 calls.
browser_sandbox_gatewayhosted_browser_sandbox_provider_configured_unverified · Live worker browser sessions are represented as remote sandbox sessions, with hosted provider readiness separate from local CDP proof.
dashboard_visual_proofimplemented · Operator dashboard exposes API, browser, safety, and visual-test readiness.
docker_connector_deploymentcompose_contract_present · Docker Compose defines the Node runtime, FastAPI connector, Next.js PWA, and FalkorDB dependency services.
graphiti_container_product_memorygraphiti_container_runtime_present · Node connector image can run real Graphiti/FalkorDB product memory when credentials enable the adapter.
postgres_storage_profilepostgres_compose_profile_present_sqlite_runtime · Docker Compose defines a Postgres transactional storage target while the current app runtime remains safely on SQLite until migration tests pass.
postgres_docker_secret_runtime_profilepostgres_docker_secret_runtime_profile_present · A dedicated compose override selects Postgres runtime through a Docker-secret database URL without bypassing proof gates.
hosted_browser_sandbox_providerhosted_browser_sandbox_provider_configured_unverified · Hosted/WebRTC browser sandbox provider can replace loc
